name: Chocolate Peanut Butter Ritz Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Take 2 Ritz crackers and spread peanut butter on one cracker.
2. Place the other cracker on top to form a sandwich.
3. Melt the chocolate in the microwave or stovetop.
4. Dip the cookie into the melted chocolate, ensuring it is completely covered.
5. Set the coated cookies on waxed paper to allow the chocolate to set.
Note: White chocolate can also be used.
